mapper.sql: SELECT c.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_likes WHERE content_id = c.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_reviews WHERE content_id = c.id) AS review_count FROM contents c
mapper.select: WHERE c.is_active = true ORDER BY c.category, c.id
WHERE c.is_active = true AND c.category = #{category} ORDER BY c.id
mapper.update: UPDATE contents SET is_active = false WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE contents SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, body = #{body} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE contents SET image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE category = #{category}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM content_likes WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND content_id = #{contentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO content_likes (`쉼표번호`, content_id) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{contentId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM content_likes WHERE `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호} AND content_id = #{contentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_likes WHERE content_id = #{contentId}

SELECT r.id, r.`쉼표번호`, r.content_id, r.rating, r.body, r.created_at, u.nickname FROM content_reviews r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.`쉼표번호` = u.`쉼표번호` WHERE r.content_id = #{contentId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO content_reviews (`쉼표번호`, content_id, rating, body, created_at) VALUES (#{쉼표번호}, #{contentId}, #{rating}, #{body}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, `쉼표번호`, content_id, rating, body, created_at FROM content_reviews WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM content_reviews WHERE id = #{id} AND `쉼표번호` = #{쉼표번호}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_reviews WHERE content_id = #{contentId}
